typeLine: Dabbler's Silver Flask of the Rainbow
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Viridi's Veil
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Minion Gems
explicitMods: Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky while you have a Magic Ring Equipped
You are Hexproof if you have a Magic Ring in right slot
Take no Extra Damage from Critical Strikes if you have a Magic Ring in left slot
flavourText: "Her sisters eternally fought for that shining apex in the skies,
but Viridi instead found strength in humility."
- Azmerian Creation Myth

socketedItems.secDescrText: Raises a spectral version of a defeated foe as a minion to fight for you in battle.
explicitMods: Minions have +50% to all Elemental Resistances
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +2 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that create minions which can be damaged. Cannot support triggered skills.
explicitMods:
Minions from Supported Skills take 15% of Hit Damage from their Life before
you if they are your only Minion
Supported Skills have 20% increased Minion maximum Life
Minions from Supported Skills have 60% more maximum Life if they are your only Minion
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: The Black Sekhema was a formidable fighter
alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills which create Minions.

and on each side of the targeted area

name: Chimeric Slippers
implicitMods: Poisons you inflict deal Damage 5% faster

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 19% less Damage from Enemies in Aura
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants armour to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 1026 additional Armour
You and nearby allies gain 49% more Armour
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants additional energy shield and increased energy shield recharge rate to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 217 additional Energy Shield
You and nearby Allies gain 30% increased Energy Shield Recharge Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Modifiers to Buff Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
Your and nearby allies' Energy Shield Recharges are not delayed by Damage
hybrid.secDescrText: Casts a temporary aura that prevents energy shield recharge being delayed by damage taken for you and your allies.

name: Foulborn Aegis Aurora
explicitMods: Recover Energy Shield equal to 2% of Armour when you Block
flavourText: Born from the marriage of ice and sky,
the aurora evokes both awe and power.

properties.name: Travel, AoE, Chaos, Movement, Blink, Spell, Duration

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants Elusive and a buff that grants Phasing. While you have this buff, monsters that enter an area around you will be Withered. Using a skill or losing the Elusive buff ends this skill's effects. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills. Cannot be used while already Elusive.
explicitMods:
Cannot be Cast or Triggered while Elusive
Grants Elusive
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
38% increased Effect of Elusive from this Skill
Inflicts 8 Withered Debuffs the first time each Enemy enters the Area
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 54% increased Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Whispers of Infinity
implicitMods: 12% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
explicitMods: 7 to 21 Added Attack Chaos Damage per 100 Maximum Mana
Skills Cost Energy Shield instead of Mana or Life
flavourText: In the Atlas, you do not go mad. You are rewritten.

name: Vortex Nails
implicitMods: +13% to Chaos Damage over Time Multiplier

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
explicitMods: Buff grants +26% Chance to Block Spell Damage while holding a Shield
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Cold, Travel, Blink, AoE

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods:
20% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
100% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.name: Morbid Leer
explicitMods: 15% increased Damage over Time while holding a Shield
7% chance to gain Phasing for 4 seconds on Kill
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

name: Betrayal's Sting
implicitMods: Adds 4 to 12 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitMods: 46% chance to inflict an additional Poison on the same Target when you inflict Poison
flavourText: It is not a wound caused by an enemy that bites us twice.
It is the smile, the nod... the handshake... of a former friend.

name: Rage Guardian
implicitMods: 11% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Chaos Damage
craftedMods: Regenerate 162 Energy Shield per second while a Rare or Unique Enemy is Nearby

socketedItems.secDescrText: This spell creates ethereal blades which orbit in an area around you, dealing damage every 0.6 seconds to all enemies in their radius. As more blades are added, the damage becomes greater and more frequent.
explicitMods: 40% increased Hit Rate for each blade
Can have up to 10 active spinning blades

explicitMods: Supported Spells Sacrifice a random nearby Damageable Minion on Cast to gain added Physical Damage equal to 2.8% of Sacrificed Minion's Life
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

name: Mageblood
explicitMods: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

typeLine: Alchemist's Sapphire Flask of the Owl
explicitMods: 65% reduced Effect of Curses on you during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
28% increased Rarity of Items found during Effect
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 7% increased Damage
Recover 3% of Energy Shield when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

name: Bino's Kitchen Knife
explicitMods:
On Killing a Poisoned Enemy, Enemies within 3 metres are Poisoned, and you and
Allies Regenerate 400 Life per second for the Poison's duration if within 3 metres
flavourText: Calling it poison would imply
that it was even edible.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, triggering linked spells. The brand will detach if the enemy dies.
explicitMods: Increases and Reductions to Cast Speed also apply to this Skill's Activation frequency
Can be Attached for a total Duration of 3.00 seconds
Can be Detached for a total Duration of 5.00 seconds

Cursed Rare and Unique Enemies have 18% less Action Speed

a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.
